metadata.description: Hermit fleet - autonomous personal assistants for Claude Code projects. Core runtime plus domain hermits.

plugins.name: claude-code-hermit
plugins.description: Core hermit - memory-driven learning, daily rhythm, idle agency, and operational hygiene for Claude Code

plugins.name: claude-code-dev-hermit
plugins.description: Language-agnostic safety layer + dev conventions for any agent your hermit uses to write code

plugins.name: claude-code-homeassistant-hermit
plugins.description: Home Assistant layer for claude-code-hermit — skills, subagents, safety hook, and Python CLI for an autonomous HA assistant

plugins.name: claude-code-fitness-hermit
plugins.description: Fitness/training layer for claude-code-hermit — Strava MCP integration, activity analysis skills, and routine templates for an autonomous training assistant

plugins.name: matrix
plugins.description: Matrix channel for Claude Code — bidirectional MCP bridge with media (images, audio, video, files), reactions, edits, typing/presence, optional STT/TTS voice round-trip, and built-in access control. Manage pairing, allowlists, and rooms via /matrix:access.
